The killer move

Before we touch your food cost, we find money in your invoices.

On a typical $50,000 monthly invoice spend, our system catches things your supplier is hoping you miss.

Every single invoice. Automatic. Before you even think about recipes.

What we catch per month

Quiet price increases 12–18 items
Unit conversion errors
case vs each, lb vs oz 2–4 errors
Mispriced or misbilled items 1–3 items
Total recovered $400–$1,800
That's $4,800–$21,600/year in invoice errors alone. The tool costs $948/year.
3 steps

Set up once. Runs every day.

1

Snap your menu.

Multimodal AI generates draft recipes for every dish on your menu. 60 seconds, zero typing.

2

Snap your invoices.

We parse Sysco, US Foods, Restaurant Depot, your local farm. Auto-track every price change. Flag every supplier hike before it eats your margin.

3

Connect your POS.

We calibrate recipes against actual sales over 30 days. By day 31, your food cost is accurate within 5%. You see it every morning.

Why now

Multimodal AI can finally read a menu and an invoice.
So you do not have to type recipes anymore.
Built by an operator

"I am Pea. I run HolyShred, a Thai fast casual in San Francisco. 500 square feet. Profitable. I built this because I was tired of counting cans on Sunday nights and getting fooled by my Sysco rep. I use it every day."

No. Your data is technically isolated. Pea cannot see your data. Anonymized benchmarking is opt-in only and earns you a discount.
